Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.CameraException

  • Packages that use CameraException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.
    com.irurueta.geometry.refiners  

    • Uses of CameraException in com.irurueta.geometry

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that throw CameraException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> PinholeCamera.arePointsInFrontOfCamera​(java.util.List<Point3D> points)
      Returns list indicating if corresponding provided points are located in front of the camera.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> PinholeCamera.arePointsInFrontOfCamera​(java.util.List<Point3D> points, double threshold)
      Returns list indicating if corresponding provided points are located in front of the camera.
      void PinholeCamera.arePointsInFrontOfCamera​(java.util.List<Point3D> points, java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> result)
      COmputes list indicating if corresponding provided points are located in front of the camera or not.
      void PinholeCamera.arePointsInFrontOfCamera​(java.util.List<Point3D> points, java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> result, double threshold)
      Computes list indicating if corresponding provided points are located in front of the camera or not.
      DualQuadric Camera.backProject​(DualConic dualConic)
      Back-projects a 2D dual conic into a 3D dual quadric.
      void Camera.backProject​(DualConic dualConic, DualQuadric result)
      Back-projects a 2D dual conic into a 3D dual quadric and stores the result into provided dual quadric instance.
      Point3D Camera.backProject​(Point2D point)
      Back-projects provided 2D point into a 3D point.
      abstract void Camera.backProject​(Point2D point, Point3D result)
      Back-projects provided 2D point into a 3D point and stores the result into provided instance.
      void PinholeCamera.backProject​(Point2D point, Point3D result)
      Back-projects provided 2D point into a 3D point and stores the result into provided instance.
      java.util.List<Point3D> Camera.backProjectPoints​(java.util.List<Point2D> points)
      Back-projects provided 2D points into their corresponding 3D points.
      void Camera.backProjectPoints​(java.util.List<Point2D> points, java.util.List<Point3D> result)
      Back-projects provided 2D points into their corresponding 3D points and stores the result into provided list.
      void PinholeCamera.cheiralities​(java.util.List<Point3D> points, java.util.List<java.lang.Double> result)
      Computes the cheirality of the list of provided points and stores the result in result list.
      Point3D PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterDet()
      Computes camera center using determinants of camera matrix minors.
      void PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterDet​(Point3D result)
      Computes camera center using determinants of camera matrix minors.
      Point3D PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterFiniteCamera()
      Computes camera center.
      void PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterFiniteCamera​(Point3D result)
      Computes camera center.
      Point3D PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterSVD()
      Computes camera center using singular value decomposition.
      void PinholeCamera.computeCameraCenterSVD​(Point3D result)
      Computes camera center using singular value decomposition.
      private void PinholeCamera.computeIntrinsicsAndRotation()
      Decompose camera matrix 3x3 left minor and computes camera intrinsic parameters and rotation.
      void PinholeCamera.decompose()
      Decomposes current camera matrix to determine its intrinsic and extrinsic parameters (rotation and translation).
      void PinholeCamera.decompose​(boolean decomposeIntrinsicsAndRotation)
      Decomposes current camera matrix to determine its camera center.
      void PinholeCamera.decompose​(boolean decomposeIntrinsicsAndRotation, boolean decomposeCameraCenter)
      Decomposes current camera matrix.
      void PinholeCamera.depths​(java.util.List<Point3D> points, java.util.List<java.lang.Double> result)
      Computes the depth of provided points respect to camera center and stores the result in provided result list.
      void PinholeCamera.fixCameraSign()
      Fixes the camera sign so that point cheirality can be correctly determined.
      double PinholeCamera.getCameraSign()
      Returns camera sign of this camera.
      double PinholeCamera.getCameraSign​(double threshold)
      Returns camera sign of this camera up to provided threshold.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Double> PinholeCamera.getCheiralities​(java.util.List<Point3D> points)
      Return the cheirality of the list of provided points.
      double PinholeCamera.getCheirality​(Point3D point)
      Computes the cheirality of a point.
      double PinholeCamera.getDepth​(Point3D point)
      Returns the depth of provided point respect to camera center.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Double> PinholeCamera.getDepths​(java.util.List<Point3D> points)
      Returns the depth of provided points respect to camera center.
      double[] PinholeCamera.getPrincipalAxisArray()
      Returns the principal axis as an array consisting of the x,y,z coordinates of the director vector of the principal plane.
      boolean PinholeCamera.isPointInFrontOfCamera​(Point3D point)
      Determines if a given point is located in front of the camera.
      boolean PinholeCamera.isPointInFrontOfCamera​(Point3D point, double threshold)
      Determines if a given point is located in front of the camera up to given threshold.
      void PinholeCamera.pointAt​(Point3D point)
      Modifies camera so that it points to provided point while keeping the camera center.
      void PinholeCamera.principalAxisArray​(double[] result)
      Computes the principal axis as an array consisting of the x,y,z coordinates of the director vector of the principal plane.
      Conic Camera.project​(Quadric quadric)
      Projects a 3D quadric into a 2D conic.
      void Camera.project​(Quadric quadric, Conic result)
      Projects a 3D quadric into a 2D conic and stores the result into provided conic instance.
      void PinholeCamera.rotate​(Rotation3D cameraRotation)
      Combines current camera rotation with provided rotation.
      void PinholeCamera.setCameraRotation​(Rotation3D cameraRotation)
      Sets camera rotation of this camera.
      void PinholeCamera.setFromLineAndPlaneCorrespondences​(Plane plane1, Plane plane2, Plane plane3, Plane plane4, Line2D line1, Line2D line2, Line2D line3, Line2D line4)
      Estimates this camera parameters from line/plane correspondences.
      void PinholeCamera.setFromPointCorrespondences​(Point3D point3D1, Point3D point3D2, Point3D point3D3, Point3D point3D4, Point3D point3D5, Point3D point3D6, Point2D point2D1, Point2D point2D2, Point2D point2D3, Point2D point2D4, Point2D point2D5, Point2D point2D6)
      Estimates this camera parameters from 2D-3D point correspondences.
      void PinholeCamera.setIntrinsicParameters​(PinholeCameraIntrinsicParameters intrinsicParameters)
      Sets camera intrinsic parameters.
      Constructors in com.irurueta.geometry that throw CameraException 
      Constructor Description
      PinholeCamera​(Plane plane1, Plane plane2, Plane plane3, Plane plane4, Line2D line1, Line2D line2, Line2D line3, Line2D line4)
      Creates an instance of a pinhole camera by estimating its parameters from line/plane correspondences.
      PinholeCamera​(Point3D point3D1, Point3D point3D2, Point3D point3D3, Point3D point3D4, Point3D point3D5, Point3D point3D6, Point2D point2D1, Point2D point2D2, Point2D point2D3, Point2D point2D4, Point2D point2D5, Point2D point2D6)
      Creates an instance of a pinhole camera by estimating its parameters from 2D-3D point correspondences.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected void PinholeCameraRefiner.cameraToParameters​(PinholeCamera camera, double[] result)
      Sets camera parameters into array of parameters.
